items.title: Another college football season projection which favors Notre Dame with MATH

items.title: There are hints of Notre Dame vs Texas Tech being scheduled for 2027 and 2028
items.summary: According to a report on 247, the Texas Tech Red Raiders are looking to schedule a big non-conference home and home series for the 2027 and 2028 college football season. Obviously… Notre Dame is being mentioned as one of the possible teams. But here’s the thing… Notre Dame’s 2027 schedule is already full with 12 […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football: Irish are big favorites in the “Games of the Year”
items.summary: We are less than three months away from the start of the college football season, but we have some college football odds that are out there now which say a lot about Notre Dame’s possible fortunes in 2026. According to DraftKings Sportsbook, Notre Dame is favored in all four of its “games of the year” […]

items.title: Why do people want Notre Dame to wear gold hooker pants?
items.summary: It’s June, so obviously one of our favorite offseason topics concerns the aesthetic of the Notre Dame Football program. Yes… it’s GOLD PANTS time. items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: The Irish must REALLY want linebacker Amarri Irvin
items.summary: Marcus Freeman has been an incredible recruiter for the Fighting Irish ever since he stepped onto Notre Dame’s campus. items.title: How many eyeballs will see Notre Dame on the road this season?
items.summary: Notre Dame will go on the road six times during the 2027 college football season. We all know that (at least on paper) Notre Dame’s schedule isn’t filled with a number of tough games. items.title: Notre Dame’s Leonard Moore is on the new EA Sports CFB 27 cover
items.summary: In July, EA Sports will be releasing this year’s version of the wildly popular College Football video game. items.title: Two Irish Legends Among Nominees for the 2027 College Football Hall of Fame Class
items.summary: The National Football Foundation announced the 2027 College Football Hall of Fame ballot this week, and among the 80 FBS players under consideration are two names that should be very familiar to Notre Dame fans: Luther Bradley and Manti Te’o. Considering that more than 5.8 million people have played college football since the first intercollegiate […]

items.title: Notre Dame’s Manti Te’o and Luther Bradley are on the CFB Hall of Fame ballot
items.summary: From the NFF press release: IRVING, Texas (June 1, 2026) – The National Football Foundation (NFF) announced today the names on the 2027 Ballot under consideration for induction into the NFF College Football Hall of Fame. The 2027 ballot includes 80 players and nine coaches from the NCAA Football Bowl Subdivision and 99 players and 39 […]
